name: ISO11783IL_PDDSetSectionState
title: ISO11783IL_PDDSetSectionState
syntax: long ISO11783IL_PDDSetSectionState(dword ddiOfCondensedState, dword elementNumber, dword sectionNumber, dword sectionState); // form 1
description: Sets the state of a single section.
For the already specified DDIs (currently in range DDI=0 and DDI=520), the functions check if the sectionNumber fits to the DDI.

parameters.name: ddiOfCondensedState
parameters.description: Data dictionary identifier the condensed state belongs to, e.g.:
